subject: [PATCH v3 4/4] memcg: multi objcg charge support

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch addresses a performance regression caused by the conversion of obj_cgroup to per-memcg per-node type, which resulted in thrashing of per-CPU obj_stock_pcp due to caching exactly one cached_objcg. The patch introduces multi-slot support for obj_stock_pcp, mirroring the pattern used by memcg_stock_pcp, allowing multiple slots to hold per-node objcg variants and a few siblings without forcing a drain. This is achieved by turning nr_bytes and cached_objcg into arrays, scanning all slots on consume/refill/account, and evicting a random slot only when full.
